content: Plan: (1) Add detect_base_branch() helper that tries develop, main, origin/develop, origin/main. (2) Add --base CLI flag to swarm merge with auto-detect default. (3) Fix hardcoded develop at branch creation (line 422) and diff generation (line 467). (4) Refactor discover_worktrees and extract_diff_ranges to use the same helper.
